series_metadata.series_description: Includes records that have short-lived administrative, legal or fiscal value. They convey information of temporary importance and are of no value once read/viewed/heard and/or acted upon. This series includes, but is not limited to: transient messages, notes, working drafts and other documents, regardless of media format, that serve to convey information of temporary value to which no lasting significance attaches.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: no longer of value LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed. ; Electronic: no longer of value LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed
